interfaces.label: SmlSearchHttpResponse
description: Response body for `POST /internal/agent_context_layer/sml/_search`.

misc.label: SML_HTTP_SEARCH_QUERY_MAX_LENGTH
description: Max length of `query` for POST `/internal/agent_context_layer/sml/_search`.

misc.label: SmlSearchFilters
description:
Per-type filter criteria for SML search.
Keys must be values of

misc.label: SmlSearchFilterType
description:
Allowed type keys for the `filters` parameter in SML search.
Extend this enum when adding new filterable SML types.

interfaces.label: SmlChunk
description: A single SML chunk to be indexed.

children.label: type
description: Type of the chunk (e.g., 'dashboard', 'lens', 'esql')

children.label: content
description: Searchable content (indexed as `semantic_text`)

children.label: title
description: Display title

children.label: description
description: Longer summary for semantic search (indexed as `semantic_text`); omit or empty if none

children.label: user_id
description: Owner or last-modifier user id when known

children.label: references
description: Other SML chunk ids this item references

children.label: permissions
description: Permissions required to access the underlying element (e.g., 'saved_object:lens/get')

interfaces.label: SmlContext
description: Context passed to SML type hooks (`list` and `getSmlData`).

interfaces.label: SmlData
description: Return value from getSmlData — normalized data to index.

interfaces.label: SmlDocument
description: An SML document as stored in the system index.

children.label: id
description: Unique id of the chunk

children.label: type
description: SML type (e.g., 'visualization', 'dashboard')

children.label: title
description: Display title

children.label: origin_id
description: Origin ID (e.g., saved object ID)

children.label: content
description: Searchable content (`semantic_text` in the index)

children.label: description
description: Semantic summary (`semantic_text` in the index)

children.label: user_id
description: Owner or last-modifier user id

children.label: references
description: Referenced SML chunk ids

children.label: created_at
description: Timestamp when first created

children.label: updated_at
description: Timestamp when last updated

children.label: spaces
description: Space IDs this item belongs to

children.label: permissions
description: Permissions required to access the underlying element

interfaces.label: SmlListItem
description: An item returned by the `list` hook of an SML type.

children.label: id
description: Unique ID of the attachment (e.g., saved object ID)

children.label: updatedAt
description: Last updated timestamp — used by crawler for change detection

children.label: spaces
description: Space IDs this item belongs to

interfaces.label: SmlToAttachmentContext
description: Context passed to the toAttachment hook.

interfaces.label: SmlTypeDefinition
description:
Server-side type definition for SML (Semantic Metadata Layer).

Registered via `agentContextLayer.registerType()` during plugin setup.

Solutions register these to make their content discoverable via the SML.

children.label: id
description: Unique identifier for this SML type (e.g., 'dashboard', 'lens', 'esql')

children.label: list
description:
Yield pages of items to consider for indexing.
Called by the crawler to enumerate candidates.
Each yielded array is one page; the crawler processes pages
with O(page_size) memory instead of loading everything at once.

children.label: getSmlData
description: Return normalized data to index for a specific item.

children.label: toAttachment
description: Convert an SML document into a conversation attachment.

children.label: fetchFrequency
description:
Optional: custom crawl interval for the crawler.
Defaults to '10m' if not provided.

misc.label: SmlIndexAction
description: Action to index an SML attachment.

misc.label: SmlResolvedItemResult
signature: { success: true; chunk_id: string; attachment: { type: string; data: unknown; origin: string; description: string; }; } | { success: false; chunk_id: string; attachment_type?: string | undefined; message: string; }

misc.label: SmlSearchFilters
description:
Per-type filter criteria for SML search.
Keys must be values of

misc.label: SmlSearchFilterType
description:
Allowed type keys for the `filters` parameter in SML search.

misc.label: SmlSearchResult
description: An SML search result — same fields as

plus relevance score.
`content` and `description` are optional when excluded from `_source` (e.g. `skipContent`).

objects.label: smlElasticsearchIndexMappings

Elasticsearch `mappings` block for the SML data index (e.g. integration tests, tooling).
Field definitions match `smlStorageSchemaProperties` / `storageSettings`.
